title: lasiobema strychnoideum
intro: Lasiobema strychnoideum, also known as the bitter root, is a perennial plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It is a member of the gentian family, known for its unique properties and medicinal value. The plant has been used to treat digestive issues and as a natural remedy for nausea and vomiting, due to its bitter compounds and alkaloids that stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms. Herbal preparations of Lasiobema strychnoideum include tinctures and teas, which can be used to support digestive health and alleviate stomach discomfort.
